mapper.select:
SELECT ID, INVOICE_ID, INVOICE_NO, ISSUE_DATE, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK, INVOICE_LINES, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DEDUCTION, NOTE, PAYEE, CHECKER, INVOICE_CLERK, RANDOM_NUM, FILE_URL, FILE_URL_XML, SELLER_TAX_ID, SELLER_NAME, SELLER_ADDR_TEL, SELLER_TEL, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, SELLER_ACCOUNT, BUYER_TAX_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDR_TEL, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, BUYER_ACCOUNT, COUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST
id = #{id}

SELECT ID, INVOICE_ID, INVOICE_NO, ISSUE_DATE, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK, INVOICE_LINES, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DEDUCTION, NOTE, PAYEE, CHECKER, INVOICE_CLERK, RANDOM_NUM, FILE_URL, FILE_URL_XML, SELLER_TAX_ID, SELLER_NAME, SELLER_ADDR_TEL, SELLER_TEL, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, SELLER_ACCOUNT, BUYER_TAX_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDR_TEL, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, BUYER_ACCOUNT, COUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST
INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId}

SELECT tsir.* FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST tsir LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE tfi ON TSIR.INVOICE_ID = TFI.id LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL tfid ON TFI.id = TFID.INVOICE_ID
TFID.id = #{id}
SELECT tsir.* FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST tsir LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE tfi ON TSIR.INVOICE_ID = TFI.id WHERE tfi.STATUS !='2' AND TFI.SYS_INVOICE_CODE = #{invoiceCode} ORDER BY tsir.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT tsir.* FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST tsir LEFT JOIN T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL tfcdb ON TSIR.INVOICE_ID = tfcdb.id WHERE tfcdb.STATUS !='2' AND tfcdb.CNDN_CODE = #{cnDnCode} ORDER BY tsir.CREATE_TIME DESC

SELECT tsria.* FROM T_SD_RED_INVOICE_APPLY tsria LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE tfi ON tsria.INVOICE_ID = TFI.id LEFT JOIN T_FD_INVOICE_DETAIL tfid ON TFI.id = TFID.INVOICE_ID
TFID.id = #{id}

SELECT ID INVOICE_ID INVOICE_NO ISSUE_DATE SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK INVOICE_LINES TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT DEDUCTION NOTE PAYEE CHECKER INVOICE_CLERK RANDOM_NUM FILE_URL FILE_URL_XML SELLER_TAX_ID SELLER_NAME SELLER_ADDR_TEL SELLER_TEL SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT SELLER_ACCOUNT BUYER_TAX_ID BUYER_NAME BUYER_ADDR_TEL BUYER_TEL BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT BUYER_ACCOUNT COUNT CREATE_BY CREATE_BY_NAME CREATE_TIME UPDATE_BY UPDATE_BY_NAME UPDATE_TIME FROM T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST
INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST(ID, INVOICE_ID, INVOICE_NO, ISSUE_DATE, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK, INVOICE_LINES, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT, DEDUCTION, NOTE, PAYEE, CHECKER, INVOICE_CLERK, RANDOM_NUM, FILE_URL, FILE_URL_XML, SELLER_TAX_ID, SELLER_NAME, SELLER_ADDR_TEL, SELLER_TEL, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, SELLER_ACCOUNT, BUYER_TAX_ID, BUYER_NAME, BUYER_ADDR_TEL, BUYER_TEL, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT, BUYER_ACCOUNT, COUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issueDate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specialInvoiceMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInclusivePriceMark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceLines, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxExclusiveTotalAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxTotalAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxInclusiveTotalAmount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deduction, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{note, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payee, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checker, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceClerk, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{randomNum, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrl, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrlXml, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerTaxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerAddrTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerFinancialAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sellerAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerTaxId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerAddrTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerTel, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerFinancialAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{buyerAccount, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{count, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_SD_INVOICE_REQUEST SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_ID = #{invoiceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_NO = #{invoiceNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISSUE_DATE = #{issueDate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPECIAL_INVOICE_MARK = #{specialInvoiceMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_INCLUSIVE_PRICE_MARK = #{taxInclusivePriceMark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_LINES = #{invoiceLines,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_EXCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{taxExclusiveTotalAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{taxTotalAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_INCLUSIVE_TOTAL_AMOUNT = #{taxInclusiveTotalAmount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DEDUCTION = #{deduction,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOTE = #{note,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYEE = #{payee,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHECKER = #{checker,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_CLERK = #{invoiceClerk,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RANDOM_NUM = #{randomNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FILE_URL = #{fileUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FILE_URL_XML = #{fileUrlXml,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_TAX_ID = #{sellerTaxId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_NAME = #{sellerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_ADDR_TEL = #{sellerAddrTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_TEL = #{sellerTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT = #{sellerFinancialAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SELLER_ACCOUNT = #{sellerAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_TAX_ID = #{buyerTaxId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_NAME = #{buyerName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_ADDR_TEL = #{buyerAddrTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_TEL = #{buyerTel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT = #{buyerFinancialAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BUYER_ACCOUNT = #{buyerAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COUNT = #{count,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
